name: Governor Thompson's Turtle Bars
recipeInstructions:
Combine caramels and 1/4 cup milk in a heavy saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until the caramels are melted. Set aside.
Combine melted butter, dry cake mix, nuts, and 1/4 cup milk. Mix well.
Press half of this mixture into a greased 13-inch x 9-inch pan.
Bake at 325°F for six minutes. As soon as the crust is finished baking, remove from the oven and immediately sprinkle chocolate chips on top. Spread caramel mixture over chocolate chips. Sprinkle remaining cake mixture over caramel.
Return pan to oven and bake at 325°F for 15 to 18 minutes. Cool, then cut into squares.
